Ghost Rider (2007)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $115,802,596Details
International Box Office $113,742,993
Worldwide Box Office $229,545,589
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $104,871,714
Total $104,871,714
Further financial details...

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$45,388,836 (39.2% of total gross)
Legs:2.55 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:50.4% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$120,000,000 (worldwide box office is 1.9 times production budget)
Theater counts:3,619 opening theaters/3,620 max. theaters, 5.7 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $201,308,005

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: February 16th, 2007 (Wide) by Sony Pictures
Video Release: June 12th, 2007 by Sony Pictures Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: PG-13 for horror violence and disturbing images.
Running Time: 110 minutes
Franchise: Ghost Rider
Cast, crew, or production detail: Prologue, Visual Effects
Plot point: Cancer, Demons, Good vs. Evil, Heaven and Hell, Origin Story, Young Child Dealing with the Death of a Parent
Source material: Marvel Comics
Subgenre: Action Adventure
Time period setting: 1980s
Source:Based on Comic/Graphic Novel
Genre:Action
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Super Hero
Production/Financing Companies: Relativity Media, Columbia Pictures, Crystal Sky Pictures
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
